meaning: n.一周的中间,星期三adj.一周中间的,星期三的
examples: They'll be able to go up to Washington midweek.
By midweek he was too tired to go out.
Now it was midweek and Team GB had failed to win a gold in anything.
Portuguese winger Cristiano Ronaldo and Serbia centre-back Nemanja Vidic were also on international duty in midweek.
